1.solution:
Opposite direction. Meeting positions: nth meeting at nГ—k/(k+1) laps from start.
11th=29th requires (29вҲ’11)Г—k/(k+1)=18k/(k+1) is integer вҶ’ (k+1)|18.
Divisors of 18 вүҘ 2: {2,3,6,9,18} вҶ’ k вҲҲ {1,2,5,8,17} вҶ’ 5 values.
Answer: 5.

2.solution:
A=36km/h, B=24km/h. Each overtake: both decrease by 2. After n overtakes: A=36вҲ’2n, B=24вҲ’2n.
Relative speed stays constant at 12km/h throughout. B comes to rest when 24вҲ’2n=0 вҶ’ n=12.
The 12th meeting is the last one (B's speed goes to 0 after it). 12 meetings before B comes to rest.
Answer: A (12).

3.solution:
A overtakes C 5Г—/round: in time C does 1 round, A gains 5 laps вҶ’ A does 6 rounds. v_A/v_C=6.
C overtakes B 8Г—/round: in time B does 1 round, C gains 8 laps вҶ’ C does 9 rounds. v_C/v_B=9.
v_A/v_B=6Г—9=54. Ratio A:B=54:1.
Answer: C (54:1).

5.solution:
Same direction: (GвҲ’P)Г—88/3=4 вҶ’ GвҲ’P=3/22. Opposite: 3rd meeting at 6min вҶ’ (G+P)Г—6=3 вҶ’ G+P=1/2.
P=(1/2вҲ’3/22)/2=(11/22вҲ’3/22)/2=(8/22)/2=2/11 rounds/min.
In 55 min: (2/11)Г—55=10 rounds.
Answer: 10.

6.solution:
Track T1: circumference=360ПҖ m, Mohan speed=400 m/min вҶ’ lap time=9ПҖ/10 min.
Track T2: circumference=240ПҖ m, Sohan speed=250 m/min вҶ’ lap time=24ПҖ/25 min.
They meet at P when both complete integer laps: LCM(9ПҖ/10, 24ПҖ/25)=ПҖГ—LCM(9,24)/GCD(10,25)=72ПҖ/5 min.
Sohan's rounds=(72ПҖ/5)Г·(24ПҖ/25)=72Г—25/(5Г—24)=15.
Answer: A (15).

7.solution:
When A finishes 1 lap: equal spacing вҶ’ 2b=a+c ...(I).
When A finishes 4 laps, C at same position as B was at A's 1st lap: 4c/aвүЎb/a (mod 1) вҶ’ 4cвҲ’b=ka.
With a=2bвҲ’c: solutions k=0вҶ’(7,4,1)sum=12, k=1вҶ’(7,5,3)sum=15, k=2вҶ’(7,6,5)sum=18. All valid.
Answer: D (All of the above).

9.solution:
Same direction. Distinct meeting points = |12вҲ’k|/gcd(12,k)=3.
Check all k=1..31 (kвү 12): k=3вҶ’9/3=3вң“; k=21вҶ’9/3=3вң“; k=30вҶ’18/6=3вң“. All others give вү 3.
Exactly 3 values.
Answer: C (3).

10.solution:
First meeting when P completes P/(PвҲ’Q) laps. In 5th round: 4<P/(PвҲ’Q)<5 вҶ’ 5/4<P/QвүӨ4/3.
Check: (i)9/7вүҲ1.286 вң“; (ii)13/10=1.30 вң“; (iii)19/15вүҲ1.267 вң“. All in (5/4, 4/3).
Sohan also in 4th round for all three: verified Q/(PвҲ’Q) вҲҲ (3,4) for each.
Answer: C (All the options are correct).
